requirements.summary: Create full-width hero section with culturally evocative background, headline, subheadline, tagline, scroll CTA, and warm gradient overlay
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section spans full viewport width
Background image shows classical performance, heritage architecture, or festive atmosphere
All text elements (headline, subheadline, tagline) are visible and legible
Scroll CTA button is centered and functional
Warm gradient overlay is applied

file_operations.description: Create hero section component with full-width layout, headline 'SamayYaan presents KathaLok', subheadline 'Where Bharat's Culture Comes Alive', tagline 'SamayYaan's Annual Cultural Festival Celebrating India's Timeless Heritage', scroll CTA button labeled 'Discover KathaLok ↓', and semi-transparent warm gradient overlay. Use the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png as the background. Implement smooth scroll behavior for the CTA button.
Import and render HeroSection component at the top of the main application layout to display the hero section as the first viewport element

requirements.summary: Create bold, centered ticket booking CTA strip with headline, booking button, and event details placeholders
acceptanceCriteria: CTA strip is full-width and visually prominent
Headline, button, and sub-text are centered
Placeholder text for date, venue, and city is present
Button has clear hover/active states

file_operations.description: Create ticket booking CTA component with full-width strip layout, centered headline 'Be Part of the Living Heritage', prominent button labeled 'Book Your Tickets Now', and sub-text containing placeholder date, venue, and city information. Style with heritage-inspired colors (saffron, maroon, gold accents) and implement clear hover/active button states
Import and render TicketCTA component after HeroSection in the main application layout

requirements.summary: Create Festival Highlights section with intro copy and 8 event type cards (icon, title, description)
acceptanceCriteria: Section includes intro copy at the top
All 8 event types are displayed as cards
Each card shows an icon, title, and 2-line description
Cards are arranged in a grid or horizontal scroll layout
Layout is responsive on mobile devices

file_operations.description: Create festival highlights section component with intro copy 'KathaLok bridges Ancient Bharat with contemporary expression — through voice, rhythm, story, and stage.' Display 8 event type cards in a responsive grid: (1) Talks & Dialogues using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-talks.dim_128x128.png, (2) College Band Performances using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-band.dim_128x128.png, (3) Solo Artist Performances using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-solo.dim_128x128.png, (4) Book Launches using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-books.dim_128x128.png, (5) Taal-Yudh using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-taal.dim_128x128.png, (6) Sur-SamayYaan using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-sur.dim_128x128.png, (7) Storytelling Performances using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-story.dim_128x128.png, (8) NSD Theatrical Play using frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-theatre.dim_128x128.png. Each card includes icon, title, and 2-line description as specified in BuildRequest. Implement responsive grid that adapts to mobile screens
Import and render FestivalHighlights component after TicketCTA in the main application layout

requirements.summary: Create Experience Zones section with intro text and 6 interactive zone tiles/image cards
acceptanceCriteria: Section includes intro text
All 6 experience zones are displayed
Each zone is presented as an interactive tile or image card
Tiles have hover effects or visual feedback
Layout adapts to mobile screens

file_operations.description: Create experience zones section component with intro text 'Step into India — one experience at a time.' Display 6 interactive zone cards using generated images: Ayurveda Workshops (frontend/public/assets/generated/ayurveda.dim_600x400.png), Attar & Fragrance Experience (frontend/public/assets/generated/attar.dim_600x400.png), Traditional Games of Bharat (frontend/public/assets/generated/games.dim_600x400.png), Brahmi Script Writing Demonstrations (frontend/public/assets/generated/brahmi.dim_600x400.png), Books & Literature Corner (frontend/public/assets/generated/literature.dim_600x400.png), Regional Food Stalls — A Culinary Map of India (frontend/public/assets/generated/food.dim_600x400.png). Implement hover effects and ensure responsive layout for mobile devices
Import and render ExperienceZones component after FestivalHighlights in the main application layout

requirements.summary: Create Schedule/Program Highlights section with day-wise or time-slot program overview, timeline/table layout, and optional category filtering
acceptanceCriteria: Schedule is organized by day or time slot
Uses placeholder content with clear labels
Timeline or table layout is clean and readable
Optional category filters are functional
Schedule is scrollable and responsive

file_operations.description: Create schedule section component with day-wise or time-slot based program overview using placeholder content. Implement clean timeline or table layout with optional category filtering (Talks / Music / Theatre / Zones). Ensure the schedule is scrollable and fully responsive on mobile devices
Import and render Schedule component after ExperienceZones in the main application layout

requirements.summary: Create Participate/Newsletter section with two side-by-side forms: participation form and newsletter signup
acceptanceCriteria: Two forms are displayed side-by-side on desktop
Participation form includes all specified fields
Newsletter form has email field and subscribe button
Subtext is displayed below forms
Forms stack vertically on mobile devices
Forms have validation and submission handling

file_operations.description: Create participate/newsletter section component with two side-by-side forms. Left form: Participation Form with fields for name, email, area of interest dropdown (performer/volunteer/attendee), and message textarea. Right form: Newsletter Signup with email field and subscribe button. Include subtext 'Stay connected with India's cultural pulse' below the forms. Implement form validation and basic submission handlers. Forms should stack vertically on mobile devices
Import and render ParticipateSection component after Schedule in the main application layout

requirements.summary: Create Closing/Acknowledgements section with mission statement, partner organization logos, and footer with branding, social links, and contact
acceptanceCriteria: Section includes warm closing statement
All 4 organization logos are displayed with acknowledgement text
Footer contains SamayYaan branding
Social media links are present and functional
Contact information is included

file_operations.description: Create closing/acknowledgements section component with warm closing statement about KathaLok's mission. Display logos with acknowledgement text for: Ministry of Culture using frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-moc.dim_200x200.png, IGNCA using frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-ignca.dim_200x200.png, ASI using frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-asi.dim_200x200.png, and NSD using frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-nsd.dim_200x200.png. Include footer with SamayYaan branding, social media links (placeholder URLs), and contact information
Import and render ClosingSection component after ParticipateSection in the main application layout

requirements.summary: Apply elegant, heritage-inspired design system with warm earth tone palette, serif/sans-serif typography, and classical Indian motif patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses specified warm earth tones consistently
Headings use elegant serif typography
Body text uses clean sans-serif typography
Classical Indian motifs appear as subtle background patterns
Design feels cohesive and heritage-inspired throughout

file_operations.description: Define global CSS custom properties for heritage-inspired color palette (saffron, deep maroon, ivory, gold accents, forest green). Import Google Fonts for Playfair Display (headings) and Lato or Inter (body text). Apply typography rules with serif headings and sans-serif body text. Set up base styles that support the heritage design system

Extend Tailwind configuration to include custom heritage color palette (saffron, maroon, ivory, gold, forest green), custom font families (Playfair Display for headings, Lato/Inter for body), and configure background image utilities for classical Indian motif patterns using frontend/public/assets/generated/pattern-rangoli.dim_800x800.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/pattern-mandala.dim_800x800.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/pattern-blockprint.dim_800x800.png as watermark-style patterns

requirements.summary: Ensure all sections are full-width, scroll-friendly, and fully mobile-responsive with appropriate breakpoints
acceptanceCriteria: All sections span full viewport width
Smooth scrolling behavior is implemented
Layout adapts appropriately on tablet screens
Layout adapts appropriately on mobile screens
Content remains readable and accessible at all breakpoints

file_operations.description: Ensure main application layout container applies full-width styling (w-full, max-w-none) to all section components. Implement smooth scroll behavior using CSS scroll-behavior or React scroll utilities. Verify all sections are stacked vertically in proper order and render with full viewport width

Add global smooth scroll behavior rule (html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }). Define mobile-first responsive breakpoint utilities and ensure base styles support full-width layouts across all viewport sizes
